context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Fix wind particle direction: the old formula (windDir + 180) incorrectly mapped compass bearings to canvas angles, causing particles to blow 90° off. The corrected formula (windDir + 90) properly converts meteorological compass bearings (CW from North) to canvas angles (CCW from East, Y-down).
implementation: Single-line change in initParticles(): replaced (windDir + 180) with (windDir + 90). Added a detailed comment block explaining the compass-to-canvas coordinate conversion.
